Prof. Jinpeng Chen

Associate Professor @ BUPT

  • Vice Dean
  • Doctoral Supervisor
  • CCF/CIC Senior Member
  • IEEE/ACM Member
  • Beijing, China
  • Email
  • Homepage

I am Jinpeng Chen, an Associate Professor and Doctoral Advisor at the School of Computer Science (National Model Software College), Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications (BUPT). I am a Senior Member of CCF, a Senior Member of CIC, and a member of IEEE and ACM. My research interests include social media & data mining, recommender systems, large language models, and intelligent transportation & spatiotemporal forecasting.

I have led or participated in 40+ research projects funded by national programs, provincial/ministerial agencies, and industry partners. These include the National 973 Program, National Key R&D Program, NSFC General/Youth Programs, National Social Science Foundation, Beijing Natural Science Foundation, and collaborative funds from CCF–Tencent Rhino Bird, CCF–Zhejiang Lab “Zhihai”, CCF–Zhipu LLM, SMP–IDATA Morning Star, BUPT research initiatives, and key lab open grants. I have published 100+ papers in venues such as SIGIR, NeurIPS, AAAI, ACM MM, EMNLP, TMC, TMM, and TNNLS, received the ICONIP 2022 Best Paper Award, and hold 8 patents.

Research

Our group focuses on four tightly connected directions: Social Media & Data Mining, Recommender Systems, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Intelligent Transportation & Spatiotemporal Forecasting. We emphasize principled modeling, robust evaluation, and deployable systems.

1) Social Media & Data Mining

  • User & Content Modeling: multimodal representation learning for posts/users (text–image–video), topic and sentiment dynamics, influence estimation.
  • Community Discovery: graph-based and dynamic community detection on interaction/interest networks; profiling communities and tracking evolution over time.

2) Recommender Systems

  • Sequential Recommendation: session- and long-horizon sequence models capturing short-term intents and long-term preferences; temporal/context signals.
  • Multimodal Recommendation: fusing text, image, and behavioral cues for cold-start and explainability; contrastive and cross-modal alignment.
  • Fine-grained User & Item Modeling: attribute- and aspect-level representations, disentangled factors, and side-information enrichment for precise matching.

3) Large Language Models (LLMs)

  • Model Lightweighting: distillation, pruning, quantization, and parameter-efficient tuning (LoRA/QLoRA) for efficient training and inference.
  • Multi-Agent Applications: planner–solver–critic pipelines, tool-augmented agents for retrieval/recommendation, evaluation agents for safety and reliability.

4) Intelligent Transportation & Spatiotemporal Forecasting

  • Traffic Flow Prediction: graph neural models over road networks (sensor/road-link graphs), dynamic connectivity, and data fusion (speed/volume/ETC).
  • Spatiotemporal Forecasting: multi-scale temporal modeling, spatial attention and diffusion on grids/graphs, probabilistic forecasting and uncertainty.
  • Autonomous-Driving Assistance: perception–map–trajectory fusion, intention and risk prediction for driving decision support under real-time constraints.

Publications

Peer-reviewed journal/conference papers from 2023+. Preprints (arXiv/CoRR) are excluded.

2025

  1. Adaptive graph diffusion networks: compact and expressive GNNs with large receptive fields. Sun, Chuxiong and Zhang, Muhan and Hu, Jie and Gu, Hongming and Chen, Jinpeng and Yang, Mingchuan Artif. Intell. Rev. 2025. [Link]
  2. IDBR: Interaction-Aware Dual-Granularity Learning for Bundle Recommendation. Wang, Jinqing and Cao, Yuan and Zhang, Fan and Kou, Feifei and Wei, Kaimin and Zhang, Jinghui and Chen, Jinpeng Big Data Min. Anal. 2025. [Link]
  3. Dual-view collaboration fusion on diffusion learning for bundle recommendation. Chen, Jinpeng and Wang, Jinqing and Zhang, Fan and Cao, Yuan and Wei, Kaimin and Huang, Liwei and Zhu, Haoran and Kou, Feifei and Huang, Hongben Inf. Fusion 2025. [Link]
  4. PD-DRL: Towards privacy-preserving and energy-sustainable UAV crowdsensing. Chen, Xiaohui and Wei, Kaimin and Chen, Jinpeng and Wu, Yongdong Internet Things 2025. [Link]
  5. Privacy-Preserving Multitask Online Matching in Mobile Crowdsensing: A Snapshot-Based Approach. Wei, Kaimin and Zhao, Shiting and Chen, Jinpeng and Pei, Tingrui and Sun, Dezhi IEEE Internet Things J. 2025. [Link]
  6. Scalable and Adaptive Graph Neural Networks with Self-Label-Enhanced Training. Sun, Chuxiong and Hu, Jie and Gu, Hongming and Chen, Jinpeng and Liang, Wei and Yang, Mingchuan Pattern Recognit. 2025. [Link]
  7. Driving Risk Assessment for Intelligent Vehicles Based on Entropy-Informed Graph Neural Networks and Gaussian Distributions. Gao, Hongbo and Wang, Chengbo and Niu, Runda and Fang, Xiaozhao and Chen, Jinpeng and Sun, Yining and Jin, Huiqing and Wang, Danwei IEEE Trans. Neural Networks Learn. Syst. 2025. [Link]
  8. HLMEA: Unsupervised Entity Alignment Based on Hybrid Language Models. Jin, Xiongnan and Wang, Zhilin and Chen, Jinpeng and Yang, Liu and Oh, Byungkook and Hwang, Seung-won and Li, Jianqiang In AAAI-25, Sponsored by the Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence, February 25 - March 4, 2025, Philadelphia, PA, USA 2025. [Link]
  9. Leveraging the Dual Capabilities of LLM: LLM-Enhanced Text Mapping Model for Personality Detection. Bi, Weihong and Kou, Feifei and Shi, Lei and Li, Yawen and Li, Haisheng and Chen, Jinpeng and Xu, Mingying In AAAI-25, Sponsored by the Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence, February 25 - March 4, 2025, Philadelphia, PA, USA 2025. [Link]
  10. Hierarchical Intent-guided Optimization with Pluggable LLM-Driven Semantics for Session-based Recommendation. Chen, Jinpeng and He, Jianxiang and Li, Huan and Wang, Senzhang and Cao, Yuan and Wei, Kaimin and Yang, Zhenye and Ji, Ye In Proceedings of the 48th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval, SIGIR 2025, Padua, Italy, July 13-18, 2025 2025. [Link]
  11. Leveraging Multimodal Data and Side Users for Diffusion Cross-Domain Recommendation. Zhang, Fan and Chen, Jinpeng and Li, Huan and Wang, Senzhang and Cao, Yuan and Wei, Kaimin and He, Jianxiang and Kou, Feifei and Wang, Jinqing CoRR 2025. [Link]
  12. Hierarchical Intent-guided Optimization with Pluggable LLM-Driven Semantics for Session-based Recommendation. Chen, Jinpeng and He, Jianxiang and Li, Huan and Wang, Senzhang and Cao, Yuan and Wei, Kaimin and Yang, Zhenye and Ji, Ye CoRR 2025. [Link]
  13. STEP: Stepwise Curriculum Learning for Context-Knowledge Fusion in Conversational Recommendation. Yang, Zhenye and Chen, Jinpeng and Li, Huan and Jin, Xiongnan and Li, Xuanyang and Zhang, Junwei and Gao, Hongbo and Wei, Kaimin and Wang, Senzhang CoRR 2025. [Link]
  14. SpecVLM: Enhancing Speculative Decoding of Video LLMs via Verifier-Guided Token Pruning. Ji, Yicheng and Zhang, Jun and Xia, Heming and Chen, Jinpeng and Shou, Lidan and Chen, Gang and Li, Huan CoRR 2025. [Link]

2024

  1. Aggregation-based dual heterogeneous task allocation in spatial crowdsourcing. Lin, Xiaochuan and Wei, Kaimin and Li, Zhetao and Chen, Jinpeng and Pei, Tingrui Frontiers Comput. Sci. 2024. [Link]
  2. SR-HetGNN: session-based recommendation with heterogeneous graph neural network. Chen, Jinpeng and Li, Haiyang and Zhang, Xudong and Zhang, Fan and Wang, Senzhang and Wei, Kaimin and Ji, Jiaqi Knowl. Inf. Syst. 2024. [Link]
  3. CRAS: cross-domain recommendation via aspect-level sentiment extraction. Zhang, Fan and Zhou, Yaoyao and Sun, Pengfei and Xu, Yi and Han, Wanjiang and Huang, Hongben and Chen, Jinpeng Knowl. Inf. Syst. 2024. [Link]

  5. EMPNet: An extract-map-predict neural network architecture for cross-domain recommendation. Chen, Jinpeng and Zhang, Fan and Li, Huan and Lu, Hua and Jin, Xiongnan and Liu, Kuien and Li, Hongjun and Wang, Yongheng World Wide Web (WWW) 2024. [Link]
  6. From Black-box to Label-only: a Plug-and-Play Attack Network for Model Inversion. Bao, Huan and Wei, Kaimin and Chen, Yao and Hou, Hanting and Chen, Jinpeng and Wu, Yongdong In 35th British Machine Vision Conference, BMVC 2024, Glasgow, UK, November 25-28, 2024 2024. [Link]
  7. PACIFIC: Enhancing Sequential Recommendation via Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Counterfactual Data Augmentation. Chen, Jinpeng and Guan, Huachen and Li, Huan and Zhang, Fan and Huang, Liwei and Pang, Guangyao and Jin, Xiongnan In Proceedings of the 33rd ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management, CIKM 2024, Boise, ID, USA, October 21-25, 2024 2024. [Link]
  8. GI-SMN: Gradient Inversion Attack Against Federated Learning Without Prior Knowledge. Qian, Jin and Wei, Kaimin and Wu, Yongdong and Zhang, Jilian and Chen, Jinpeng and Bao, Huan In Advanced Intelligent Computing Technology and Applications - 20th International Conference, ICIC 2024, Tianjin, China, August 5-8, 2024, Proceedings, Part VIII 2024. [Link]

2023

  1. FePN: A robust feature purification network to defend against adversarial examples. Cao, Dongliang and Wei, Kaimin and Wu, Yongdong and Zhang, Jilian and Feng, Bingwen and Chen, Jinpeng Comput. Secur. 2023. [Link]
  2. Mandari: Multi-Modal Temporal Knowledge Graph-aware Sub-graph Embedding for Next-POI Recommendation. Liu, Xiaoqian and Li, Xiuyun and Cao, Yuan and Zhang, Fan and Jin, Xiongnan and Chen, Jinpeng In IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo, ICME 2023, Brisbane, Australia, July 10-14, 2023 2023. [Link]
  3. SimCGNN: Simple Contrastive Graph Neural Network for Session-based Recommendation. Cao, Yuan and Zhang, Xudong and Zhang, Fan and Kou, Feifei and Poon, Josiah and Jin, Xiongnan and Wang, Yongheng and Chen, Jinpeng CoRR 2023. [Link]

Honors and Teaching Awards

  • National Graduate Education Essay Award (Excellence); CCGEC 2025 Best Paper (First Prize); CECC 2024 Teaching Case (First Prize).
  • 3rd Prize, 12th Excellent Higher Education Paper; Zhou Jiongpang Outstanding Young Teacher Award; “ChuanYou 70” Teaching Innovation Award.
  • BUPT Graduate Teaching Achievement Award (Second Prize); BUPT Teaching Observation Competition (Second Prize); BUPT Young Teachers’ Teaching Skills (Second Prize); BUPT Teaching Innovation Competition (Second Prize).
  • Outstanding Instructor for Undergraduate Innovation & Entrepreneurship projects.

Student Mentoring

  • Supervised 20 Undergraduate Innovation & Entrepreneurship Training Projects (7 national, 9 municipal).
  • Students received BUPT Innovation & Entrepreneurship Practice Awards: First Prize (2019), Second Prize ×2 (2021), Third Prize ×2 (2018, 2021).
  • Graduate mentees won Third Prize at the BUPT Graduate Innovation & Entrepreneurship Exhibition (2020).

Teaching

Selected undergraduate and graduate courses with brief descriptions, instructors, and offering unit.

Spring 2025

Operating Systems

Undergraduate · Jinpeng Chen · School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)

Principles + implementation: process/thread model, scheduling and synchronization, virtual memory and paging, I/O and filesystem. A series of labs guide students to understand key OS mechanisms from the ground up.

ProcessesThreadsMemoryFilesystemSynchronization

Fall 2024

Cloud Computing

Undergraduate · Jinpeng Chen · School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)

Core technologies and hands-on engineering for cloud platforms: virtualization and containers, cloud-native architecture, microservices and service mesh, and Kubernetes-based deployment/operations with practical labs and a course project.

Distributed SystemsVirtualizationContainersCloud-Native

Fall 2024

Frontiers in Cross-Media Recommender Systems

Graduate · Jinpeng Chen · School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)

Multimodal representation learning and sequential recommendation: alignment of image/text/time, preference-aware causal intervention, robustness via data augmentation, and paper-to-practice reproduction with open-source toolchains.

MultimodalSequential RecCausal InterventionData Augmentation

Spring 2025

Foundations and Applications of Large Language Models

Graduate · Jinpeng Chen, Zhenye Yang, Fan Zhang · Academic Affairs Office

End-to-end LLM pipeline: pretraining/finetuning, alignment and evaluation, parameter-efficient tuning and compression for deployment, and multi-agent collaboration. The course project delivers a working demo from data to application.

LLMPEFTModel CompressionMulti-AgentDeployment

Service

Talks

  • 2025-11-02 Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Intent-driven Sequential Recommendation. Invited talk at the 11th China Conference on Intelligent Technology and Big Data (CITBD 2025).
  • 2025-06-23 Academic Talk (Invited). Zhejiang Normal University.
  • 2025-03-21 Future Recommendation: Exploring Paths to Personalized Recommendation in the LLM Era. Special guest, YOCSEF Jinan Technical Forum, National Supercomputing Center Jinan Science Park (Main Building 451).
  • 2024-12-11 Enhancing Sequential Recommendation via Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Data Augmentation. Invited talk at the Zhixing Forum: Frontiers of Data Mining and Embodied Intelligence, Beijing Jiaotong University (Siyuan Time Café).
  • 2024-11-22 Enhancing Sequential Recommendation via Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Data Augmentation. Keynote at the CETC Taiji / Institute 15 Youth Academic Exchange & Inaugural Meeting of the CSE Young Editorial Board.
  • 2024-11-16 Enhancing Sequential Recommendation via Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Data Augmentation. Invited talk at the AI for Science Academic Forum, BUPT Research Institute (on campus).
  • 2024-10-13 Enhancing Sequential Recommendation via Preference-aware Causal Intervention and Data Augmentation. Invited speaker, The 12th China National Conference on Social Media Processing (SMP 2024), Xinxiang, China.
  • 2023-11-24 Mandari: Multi-Modal Temporal Knowledge Graph-aware Sub-graph Embedding for Next-POI Recommendation. Talk at CCIR 2023 Summer School, Beijing, China.
  • 2023-07-22 Mandari: Multi-Modal Temporal Knowledge Graph-aware Sub-graph Embedding for Next-POI Recommendation. Talk at KDD China 2023 Summer School, Chengdu, China.
